Basic Biology and Microscope Laboratory

Basic Biology and Microscope Laboratory is a laboratory located on the 1st floor of the Center A Block -1.

Basic Biology and Microscope Laboratory Purposes of Use

In the Basic Biology and Microscope Laboratory, our students have the opportunity to use the theoretical knowledge they have learned in the department courses in practice. In addition to undergraduate students, it is also a laboratory where graduate students work together with the instructors in their thesis studies, projects and research.

Courses in Basic Biology and Microscope Laboratory

The laboratory practices of the General Biology 1, General Biology 2 and Physiology courses of our students studying in the Turkish and English Departments of Molecular Biology and Genetics are carried out here.
